scripts.dev:start: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- sh -c 'bun run dev:ng serve --port "$APP_HOST_PORT"'
scripts.build:app: NG_BUILD_PARTIAL_SSR=1 bun run dev:ng build && bun run build:ops
scripts.build:ops: bun run build:ops:schema && bun run build:ops:prerequisites && bun run build:ops:reset && bun run build:ops:seed
scripts.image:security:local: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bash ops/scaleway/verify-image-security.sh
scripts.build:watch: NG_BUILD_PARTIAL_SSR=1 bun run dev:ng build --watch --configuration development
scripts.test:e2e:check: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts playwright
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:e2e:check && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:ui: bun run test:e2e:check && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=setup --trace=off && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images PLAYWRIGHT_SAFE_UI_BASELINE=1 dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:integration: bun run test:e2e:check && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-integration --project=docs-integration
scripts.test:e2e:live-esncard: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts esncard-release && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/profile/user-profile-live-esncard.spec.ts tests/docs/profile/discounts.doc.ts --project=local-chrome-live-esncard --project=docs-live-esncard --grep '@needs-live-esncard'
scripts.test:e2e:live-esncard:release: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts esncard-release && bun run test:unit:esncard-provider-error && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/profile/user-profile-live-esncard.spec.ts tests/docs/profile/discounts.doc.ts --project=local-chrome-live-esncard --project=docs-live-esncard --grep '@needs-live-esncard' --trace=off --reporter=./tests/support/reporters/protected-value-sanitizer-reporter.ts,github,dot,./tests/support/reporters/complete-playwright-run-reporter.ts
scripts.test:e2e:docs: bun run test:e2e:check && DOCS_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=test-results/docs/images dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=docs-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:docs:publish: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/publish-documentation.ts
scripts.db:push: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit push --force
scripts.db:studio: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit studio
scripts.db:reset: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- sh -c 'bun helpers/reset-database-schema.ts && bun ./node_modules/drizzle-kit/bin.cjs push --force && bun helpers/database.ts'
scripts.docker:check: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts docker
scripts.docker:ps: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose ps
scripts.docker:stop: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:resume: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- bash helpers/testing/docker-resume.sh
scripts.docker:start: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -d
scripts.docker:start:watch: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -w
scripts.docker:start:foreground: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build
scripts.docker:webserver: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- bash helpers/testing/docker-webserver.sh
scripts.db:migrate: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun migration/index.ts
scripts.deps:update:drizzle: bun add drizzle-orm@rc && bun add -D drizzle-seed@rc drizzle-kit@rc
